subject: Move vFW to HTTPS VES
commit_message:
Move vFW to HTTPS VES

Issue-ID: INT-1319
Change-Id: Ie100f919d162416676ce42a7fa785c8cef2dd917
Signed-off-by: Brian Freeman <bf1936@att.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.
